mapping.attachments: [{% set fileCount = 0 %}{% for file in instance.attributes.woo_publicatie %}{% if fileCount > 0 %}, {% endif %}{{'{\"endpoint\": \"/api/v1/case/' ~ reference ~ '/document/' ~ file ~ '/download\", \"label\": \"bijlage\", \"published\": \"true\" }'}}{% set fileCount = fileCount + 1 %}{% endfor %}{% for file in instance.attributes.woo_inventarisatielijst %}{% if fileCount > 0 %}, {% endif %}{{'{\"endpoint\": \"/api/v1/case/' ~ reference ~ '/document/' ~ file ~ '/download\", \"label\": \"inventarisatielijst\", \"published\": \"true\" }'}}{% set fileCount = fileCount + 1 %}{% endfor %}{% for file in instance.attributes.woo_informatieverzoek %}{% if fileCount > 0 %}, {% endif %}{{'{\"endpoint\": \"/api/v1/case/' ~ reference ~ '/document/' ~ file ~ '/download\", \"label\": \"informatieverzoek\", \"published\": \"true\" }'}}{% set fileCount = fileCount + 1 %}{% endfor %}{% for file in instance.attributes.woo_besluit %}{% if fileCount > 0 %}, {% endif %}{{'{\"endpoint\": \"/api/v1/case/' ~ reference ~ '/document/' ~ file ~ '/download\", \"label\": \"besluit\", \"published\": \"true\" }'}}{% set fileCount = fileCount + 1 %}{% endfor %}{% for file in instance.attributes.woo_convenant %}{% if fileCount > 0 %}, {% endif %}{{'{\"endpoint\": \"/api/v1/case/' ~ reference ~ '/document/' ~ file ~ '/download\", \"label\": \"convenant\", \"published\": \"true\" }'}}{% set fileCount = fileCount + 1 %}{% endfor %}]

mapping.doctype: {% if categorie is defined and categorie == 'Convenanten' %}{{ categorie }}{% else %}OpenWOO{% endif %}
mapping.title: {{ titel | default('') }}
mapping.attachments: {% set files = getFiles(_context['@self'].id) %}{% set index = 0 %} [{% for file in files %}{% if index > 0 %}, {% endif %}{"label": "{{ file.title }}", "endpoint": "{{ file.accessUrl }}", "published": true}{% set index = index + 1 %}{% endfor %}]

openwoo-app-wetten-en-algemeen-verbinden.name: OpenWoo.app Wetten en algemeen verbindende voorschriften -> Elastic

openwoo-app-overige-besluiten-van-algeme.name: OpenWoo.app Overige besluiten van algemene strekking -> Elastic

openwoo-app-ontwerpen-van-wet-en-regelge.name: OpenWoo.app Ontwerpen van wet- en regelgeving met adviesaanvraag -> Elastic

openwoo-app-bij-vertegenwoordigende-orga.name: OpenWoo.app Bij vertegenwoordigende organen ingekomen stukken -> Elastic

openwoo-app-subsidieverplichtingen-ander.name: OpenWoo.app Subsidieverplichtingen anders dan met beschikking -> Elastic
